creator: rm@FreeBSD.org
text: Superseded by yours https://bugs.freebsd.org/bugzilla/show_bug.cgi?id=264970, closing. I agree that working rc-script is more important than the process name. Your patch adds the same commands we already have in deluged rc-script, so I believe we are good. I'll merge the change along with the 2.1.0 update. Thank you!
